name: ek-craft
description: ek-craft — data-driven brand lint for .tsx / .css / .html targets. Two layers: universal anti-AI-slop / color / typography rules adapted for cyberpunk web UI (in this skill), and palette enforcement that reads design-model.yaml from the sibling ek-design plugin (avoid list, primary axis, invariants). Brand evolution auto-adapts; no code changes here.
